audio_clips.text: A woman is walking across a narrow road.
She picks up a black and white photograph from a briefcase. The picture has four men with one woman standing in the middle wearing armor and carrying a shield.
The scene changes and the woman is on an island staring into the water.
She jumps off a cliff and dives into the water, saving a drowning person.
The woman is dressed in armor, leading an army of warriors on horses against soldiers with guns.
One of the men shoots his gun and his bullet flies in slow motion toward her.
A man dressed in modern day clothing approaches the woman dressed in battle gear.
In a factory plant, American scientists are experimenting with chemical weapons.
A huge bomb explodes, surrounded by soldiers.
The woman grabs a round shield and a long sword.
The woman named Diana appears in a room full of men, dressed in modern day clothing.
A shot fires at Captain Steve Trevor and Diana Shields him.
Diana treats the five men who are surrounding her.
this June.
Diana is now wearing the Wonder Woman tiara and carrying the shield on her back as she walks in the middle of a battlefield.
A man shoots at Diana, but she deflects the bullet using her arm shield.

In a series of action shots, Diana jumps through a glass window, slashes her sword while riding a horse, flips in the air, lashes around with a glowing lasso which causes a fiery explosion, roundhouse kicks a man, and in the end flies up in the air, crossing her arms in an X shape.
Wonder Woman!
The scene shifts to an elderly woman helping Diana wear a large poofy gown. Diana kicks around in the air in frustration.
June 2017
